items.title: It's Shaping Up to Be a Tough Day for the Nasdaq
items.summary: The Nasdaq is already on pace for its worst day since March. The tech-heavy index tumbled nearly 1.7%, which would be its biggest daily decline since it fell nearly 2.2% on March 27, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

items.title: Don't expect to see SpaceX on the S&P 500 so soon after IPO
items.summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices stated that it will not be changing its rules to fast-track SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) and other mega-IPOs into the S&P 500 index (^GSPC). Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Vanity Fair contributing editor B

items.title: ETF Zoo: What Happens When Tech Eats the Entire Market?

items.title: The Tech Rally Goes in Reverse as Markets Anticipate Tighter Money
